text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I've come to the mall looking for a<n>few things, but
it's quite busy today.<n>Looks like there might be
some kind<n>of event going on...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe they're holding a talk<n>show to
celebrate my plushies<n>becoming a huge hit...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, everyone is so excited about<n>it... Including
me, of course! ♪

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Thanks. Anyway, I better grab<n>something to eat
before it star—

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's you! You're the one who<n>saved me back
then!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap smiles and waves at me.<n>That's true—I
did save her from a<n>persistent reporter in the past.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Thank you, I am. I'm happy to see<n>you here. My—

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Goodness me! What do we have<n>here? Are you
two close?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hm? Sorry, but who are you?

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Just your everyday reporter! But<n>forget about
me—is this person<n>important to you?

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Are you tongue-tied, by any<n>chance? Don't
tell me your<n>relationship with this person would
disappoint your fans—

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Sorry, I don't have time for questions<n>right now.

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
The talk show starts in an hour<n>anyway, so
honestly, I don't see the<n>point in talking to you.
Let's go,<n>everyone.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
The way you handled the situation<n>just now was
truly admirable! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
And to think that this is the person<n>who taught you
how to do it.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, he told me I should refuse any<n>sketchy
interviews.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, she told me I should refuse any<n>sketchy
interviews.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
My fans care about me... So I need to<n>care about
myself too.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Now, that's just lovely! So that's<n>how your
plushie ended up with such<n>a great design! ♪

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hm? What's that got to do with my<n>plushie?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I think it's got everything to do<n>with it! I heard
the story from the<n>designer.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Your feedback was very honest and<n>to the point,
so they're very confident<n>in the finished product.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...They asked me for input, so I gave<n>them my
honest opinion.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Like I said, it's not fair to my fans if I<n>don't care
about myself... or my<n>image.
choice_data_list: And look where all that caring has taken you!
And look where all that caring has taken you!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Y-you're right!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: It's finally time for the event. Since<n>you're here...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Do you happen to have any advice to<n>give me
before the talk show?
choice_data_list: I've taught you everything I can. You've got this.
I've taught you everything I can. You've got this.
Is there anything you want to do?
Is there anything you want to do?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Do you happen to have any advice to<n>give me
before the talk show?
choice_data_list: I've taught you everything I can. You've got this.
I've taught you everything I can. You've got this.
Is there anything you want to do?
Is there anything you want to do?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...I see. Hehe, got it. Catch you later.

text_block_list.name: MC
text_block_list.text:
All right, then. Before we start, is<n>there anything
you'd like to say to<n>your fans, Oguri?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
First of all, I want to thank everyone<n>who bought
my plushie.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Everyone worked hard to make this<n>project a
reality. Please treat these<n>plushies as kindly as
you would treat<n>me.

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: We'll treasure them! ♪

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Haha...

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Squeee! ☆ You're such a cutie, Ogurin!<n>♪

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: O-Ogurin... I'm not sure what to say to<n>that...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
But thanks. Your words will give me<n>the extra
push I need to work hard!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Squeeee! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap's authenticity resonates<n>deeply with
her fans.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I knew it. Hearing your words fills me<n>with
strength.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Thanks, everyone. I'm grateful to you<n>all!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap's talk show turns out to be<n>a great
success.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...Haha. Good question. But I think I<n>get what
you're trying to say—don't<n>worry, I'll follow my
heart.

text_block_list.name: MC
text_block_list.text:
So, Oguri Cap, do you have any<n>words to mark the
release of your<n>plushie? Take it away!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Well, about that. Today, I want theaudience to ask me questions.

text_block_list.name: MC
text_block_list.text: ...What?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to have the opportunity to talk<n>with the
people who always cheer me<n>on. Do you have
any questions?

text_block_list.name: Audience
text_block_list.text:
Q-questions from us? Isn't this a talk<n>show? Um...
What should we ask<n>her?

text_block_list.name: Girl
text_block_list.text: I have one! Do you like plushies?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. Everyone in my family does<n>too. They
asked me to send some<n>back home.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, my mom calls the plushie<n>"Oguri Cap
the Second." I wonder<n>who the first is?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Her response sends warm laughter<n>throughout
the venue. She continues<n>to respond to questions
from her<n>fans...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Any other ques—

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Grrrooowl...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Could I answer you after lunch?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Laughter fills the venue once again.<n>The talk show
perfectly encapsulates<n>Oguri Cap's laid-back
personality,<n>leading to its success.
